metadata.purpose: Phase 4 ADAPT-02 byte-compat — proves cli_adapters/claude.py:ClaudeAdapter.build_argv produces the same argv as the v0.9.2.0 production code at the argv layer (the surrounding shell-execution wrapper stays in mcp_tools.sub_agent through Phase 6).
